subject: A rat-humanoid figure and the glowing ghost of a child sharing a tender farewell moment
description: A rat-humanoid figure in a dark jacket with a pink-tipped mohawk crouches or sits, leaning forward gently toward a small glowing ghost that appears as a child. The ghost radiates soft teal-green light and has a translucent, pixelated or dissolving edge quality, suggesting it is fading or departing. The rat figure's posture is tender and still — face turned toward the ghost in an attitude of quiet grief or farewell. The background is dark and patterned with repeating moth or butterfly motifs on a deep teal-black ground, lending a dreamlike or haunted wallpaper quality. The mood is intimate and sorrowful.
foreground: rat-humanoid in dark jacket leaning toward glowing child-ghost, tender close encounter
background: dark patterned wallpaper with moth/butterfly motifs, deep teal-black
emotion: tender grief, quiet farewell, parting love
